Name: Morning Light
Description: Original acrylic painting by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. Warm morning light captured on canvas with rich texture and depth. Each piece is unique and comes with a certificate of authenticity.

Name: Coastal Reflections
Description: Original oil painting by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. Inspired by the Norwegian coastline near Son, Vestby. Rich blues and greens reflecting the Oslofjord.

Name: Still Waters
Description: Original mixed media work by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. A contemplative piece combining acrylic and collage elements.

Name: Abstract Seasons
Description: Large-format original acrylic painting by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. Bold colours capturing the changing Norwegian seasons.

Name: Nordic Bloom
Description: Original watercolor painting by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. Delicate floral composition inspired by Nordic wildflowers.

Name: Fjord Sunset
Description: Original oil painting by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. A stunning sunset over the Oslofjord as seen from Vestby.

Name: Morning Light (Print)
Description: High-quality giclée print of 'Morning Light' by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. Printed on archival fine art paper. Limited edition of 50.

Description: High-quality giclée print of 'Fjord Sunset' by Ingrid Amuri Rutherford. Printed on archival fine art paper. Limited edition of 50.
